items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of the persona scenario involving an audit trail showing the distinction between 'AI agent' and human actor. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific interactions or results that demonstrate this functionality. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status for this exploratory step.
